findings.description: Several PascalCase class names that appear in the section content and code examples are missing from hints: BeanUtil, ZipCodeData, ExecutionContext, FilePathSetting, ObjectMapperFactory, Result (Result.Success), CsvType, QuoteMode, FileInputStream.
